stemHtml:
Which of the following correctly translates data from the METAR of Lisbon aerodrome given below?
LPPT 150505Z 11006KT 9999 BKN016 M09/M16 Q1006 NOSIG =

options.a: Temperature is 16 degrees below ISA, visibility is at least 10 km, QNH is 1006 hPa
options.b: Report time is 05:05 UTC, dew point is minus 16°C, QNH is 1006 hPa
options.c: Wind comes from 110 degrees true, QNH is 9 hPa less than ISA, no significant changes forecast
options.d: The temperature is minus 9°C, report time is 15:05 PM, clouds are 5-7/8 at 1600 ft
